sizing_rule.note: Position size = Account Equity / Per-Contract Risk Amount. Optimal f determines contract quantity; exact f value not specified by author. Formula works across futures, stocks, options. Prevents trading down to single contracts during drawdowns by using equity-based calculations.

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined by optimal f, which achieves optimal account growth regardless of instrument type, and larger accounts should use equity-based calculations to determine contract quantities while smaller/new accounts benefit from this systematic approach to avoid trading down to single contracts during drawdowns.
